title: oxypolis rigidior
intro: Oxypolis rigidior, also known as water dropwort, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Oxypolis rigidior include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
